name: HITPerson
description: JSON Structure for a HIT Pure person (researcher).

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object, prefer using the UUID if it is present on the entity

uuid.description: UUID, this is the primary identity of the entity

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates. For new content this is null, and for existing content the current value. The property should never be modified by a client, except in the rare case where the client wants to perform an update irrespective of if other clients have made updates in the meantime, also known as a "dirty write". A dirty write is performed by not including the property value or setting the property to null

startDateAsResearcher.description: Date that the person entered into the academic profession.

affiliationNote.description: Notes regarding affiliations of the person.

employeeStartDate.description: Date of the persons first day of the institution.

employeeEndDate.description: Date of the persons last day of the institution.

orcidAuthenticated.description: Authentication status of the orcid associated with the person.

cienciaIdAuthenticated.description: Authentication status of the Ciencia ID associated with the person.

selectedForProfileRefinementService.description: If the person has been profiled.

retirementDate.description: Date of retirement for the person

willingToTakePhdStudents.description: Boolean to define if the Person is willing to take on Phd Students.

willingToTakePhdStudentsDescription.description: Field to describe or list phd projects that the person will participate in.
